content.en:
In the past few decades, in addition to cultivating the Chaos Refining Body Technique to the peak realm of the sixth layer, Ye Tian has also perfected the two Chaos Divine Secret Techniques, the Chaos Yuan Scale Armor and the Chaos Yuan Vine, making these two Chaos Divine Secret Techniques more powerful.

Other than that.

Ye Tian has also made progress in the sword path mastery, and his sword path mastery Tianyue Knife is already the strongest ordinary sword path master.

But now, Ye Tian has further improved the Tianyue Knife, trying to perfect the Tianyue Knife to the peak level.

This step is very difficult, but for Ye Tian, who has a clear path and cultivation method, it can be done.

He used the Tianyue Knife countless times, and in the process of casting, he reduced the mixed content of the Tianyue Knife's mastery, and only sought the law of the strongest sword.

Countless swings of the knife made Ye Tian and the knife seem to be completely integrated, and his understanding of the knife became deeper and deeper.

However, Ye Tian was still far from creating a peak-level sword path master.

this day.

Ye Tian called the Dark Master.

"Lord of Darkness, I want to go back to the Terran Supreme Hall and use the Chaos Tower of the Terran Supreme Hall to impact the last layer of the Chaos Refining Technique!" Ye Tian said.

"Your Highness, have you cultivated your Chaos Refining Body Technique to the peak of the sixth layer?"

The Dark Lord was shocked.

"Not bad!" Ye Tian nodded.

"Okay, I'll take you back to the Supreme Hall of the Terrans!" said the Dark Lord quickly.

That's a big deal!

Once Ye Tianzhen successfully hit the seventh layer realm of the Chaos Body Refining Technique, he was the only one of His Royal Highness of the Human Race who had cultivated the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the Consummation Realm.

Swish!

Ye Tian and the Dark Lord left, and the others didn't know about it at all.

Although the solar system is blocked, Ye Tian is not within the scope of the blockade, if he wants to leave, he can leave at any time, without restraint.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to return to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

The Dark Lord is responsible for opening the Chaos Tower, and Ye Tian does not need to apply for it at all.

Soon, the Tower of Chaos opened.

This time, it is the fourth floor of the Chaos Tower, which is the highest floor of the Chaos Tower.

The entire Chaos Tower also has only four floors, and the third layer could have met Ye Tian's requirements, but the Supreme Hall of the Human Race opened the highest layer in order to be on the safe side.

Ye Tian's contribution to the human race was simply unimaginable, although the price of opening the fourth layer of the Chaos Tower was very high, but it was nothing to the entire human race.

Therefore, the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race did not hesitate to open the fourth layer of the Chaos Tower.

And what requires the consent of the Supreme to open the fourth layer of the Chaos Tower, this time it is the Kunwu Supreme who nodded and agreed.

Rumble!!!!

The fourth floor of the Chaos Tower opened, and Ye Tian came to the Chaos Tower under the leadership of the Dark Master.

Immediately, he entered the fourth layer of the Chaos Tower, preparing to retreat and cultivate, and hit the seventh layer realm of the Chaos Refining Body Technique.

The fourth floor of the Chaos Tower.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged, running the Chaos Refining Technique, and began to absorb the Chaos Vitality and Chaos Origin Breath of the fourth layer of the Chaos Tower.

In terms of the degree of refinement, the Chaos Yuan Qi here far exceeded the first and second floors of the Chaos Tower.

Moreover, the total amount here was too much, and as soon as it was slightly absorbed, countless chaotic energy poured into the body, as if it was about to burst Ye Tian.

Time passed.

Ye Tian didn't turn on the time acceleration, so he cultivated normally.

Day 15.

Ye Tian felt the opportunity to break through, and violently ran the seventh layer of the Chaos Body Refining Technique.

Bang!!!

The Chaos Body Refining Technique broke through, and Ye Tian's body also broke the limit and stepped into another level.

At the same time, Ye Tian's body was frantically absorbing chaotic energy, increasing his body's strength and strength.

The Yuan Force is getting more and more refined, and the soul is getting stronger and stronger.

A few days passed in the blink of an eye, and Ye Tian's breakthrough stabilized.

At this time, his body was much stronger than in the past, perhaps because Ye Tian had become the first immortal clan, with the atmospheric luck of the immortal clan, and had cultivated the two sets of movements of the eighteen golden body formulas, so this time the increase brought by impacting the seventh layer of the Chaos Body Refining Technique was far greater than before.

At the same time, Ye Tian really touched a limit.

This limit seems to be the shackles of the Eternal Universe Son and the Supreme Universe Son, as long as you break this shackle, you can step into the Supreme Universe Child.

However, it is too difficult and too difficult to become a son of the universe at the emperor level, and the master of Xuanyuan also said that at the emperor level, you cannot become a supreme-level son of the universe at all, this is restricted by the rules of the universe, because at the emperor level, the body, yuan power, and soul are not perfect, and you cannot become a supreme-level son of the universe.

Ye Tian also talked to his own guard, the Dark Lord, and the Dark Lord didn't think that the Emperor level could become the son of the supreme-level universe, so Ye Tian didn't waste time attacking the son of the supreme-level universe.

But Ye Tian firmly believes that he can do it!

In the next ten days, Ye Tian continued to cultivate at the fourth layer of the Chaos Tower, stabilizing the realm of the seventh layer of the Chaos Refining Body Technique.

In the blink of an eye, more than ten days have passed.

Ye Tian came out of the Chaos Tower.

As soon as he came out, the Lord of Darkness informed him that the Kunwu Supreme had summoned him.

So, Ye Tian came to the Kunwu Palace, the Kunwu Supreme.

"Ye Tian, have you broken through the seventh layer of the Chaos Body Refining Technique?"

Kungo Supreme asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"The Chaos Body Refining Technique has reached the seventh layer, you should also hit the god level, there is no benefit in staying too long in the emperor level period. Kunwu Supreme said.

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Kunwu Supreme, I have reached the limit of the Eternal Rank Son of the Universe, and I still want to impact the Son of the Supreme Universe." "

"Do you really want to impact the Supreme-level Children of the Universe?"

Kungo Supreme asked.

"Yes. Ye Tian nodded, and then asked, "Could it be that the Kunwu Supreme thinks that the Emperor level can impact the Son of the Supreme Universe?"

Kunwu Supreme was silent for a while, and then said: "I do know some secrets, in fact, if you cultivate according to your current cultivation method, there is almost no way to break the shackles and become a supreme-level son of the universe at the emperor level, because the universe will hinder you from becoming a supreme-level son of the universe, although you have reached the limit now, you will find that it is difficult for you to make progress in other aspects, and you can't even make progress again, and you can only continue to progress if you hit the god level." But there is a way for you to continue to progress, break the shackles, and become a supreme level, but not a child of the universe!"

"Supreme, but not a child of the universe?"

Ye Tian frowned, not knowing what Kunwu Supreme meant by what he said.

I saw Kun Wu Supreme continued: "The Son of the Universe is a title that is given by the Universe, and the Son of the Universe is always blessed by the Universe, so it is difficult to transcend the Universe, even if the cultivation talent can allow a person to cultivate to the Supreme level or above, it is difficult to transcend the Universe, because the Universe does not allow you to transcend. In this way, no matter how high your cultivation talent is, it will be difficult for you to break the shackles in the universe and become a supreme level or above. In fact, many masters are not clear, and only some supreme levels understand that if you want to transcend the universe, you cannot grow according to the original intention of the universe, but you have to take another path and violate the rules of the universe. According to our guess, if you violate the rules of the universe at the emperor level, you can become a supreme-level highness, but you are no longer a child of the universe, and you will be suppressed by the universe, your cultivation speed will be slowed down by ten or even a hundred times, and your luck will be reduced a lot. Of course, you are the first immortal clan, and relying on the luck of the immortal clan, you can also make up for the luck, so there is no need to worry about this. There is one last trouble, that is, every time you break through a big realm, you will encounter a thunderstorm!"

"Thunder Tribulation!"

Ye Tian's heart moved, he thought that there was no thunder tribulation in this universe, but he didn't expect that if he took another path, there would be a thunder tribulation.

Kunwu Supreme continued: "The Thunder Tribulation is extremely terrifying, even more terrifying than the Thunder Tribulation you encountered in the Supreme Mountain, if your foundation is insufficient, it will be difficult to really grow up, and you will fall under the Thunder Tribulation. But if you break the thunder tribulation again and again, and bathe in the thunder tribulation and renew you, the final achievement is limitless. Even the existence that is expected to be above the Supreme is also the goal of all our Supremes!"

"Kunwu Supreme, is there anyone in the universe who takes this path?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There is one!" Kunwu Supreme said, "It is the one of the Protoss, that is, the first His Highness to break through the Ten Tribulations of the Supreme Mountain at the Emperor level, he was even stronger than you at the beginning, but he only survived the Ten Tribulations at the cost of serious injuries, and did not use time to reverse." In the end, he chose to hit the supreme level and gave up becoming a child of the universe. It is said that he died under the thunderstorm, but no one knows how. But the existence of the One also proves that this path is feasible, and according to the deductions of many Supreme Beings, it is enough to prove that this path can transcend the universe. Ye Tian, if you think clearly, with your talent, there is definitely a great hope of becoming a Supreme. If you choose another path, it will be difficult and dangerous, and it is easy to fall under the thunderstorm, but there is a glimmer of hope to transcend, you can choose for yourself!"

Ye Tian was silent, thought for a long time, and finally said: "I choose to take the road against the sky!"

This is not an impulse, but the result of careful consideration.

He has the talent of copying, and he has even raised all the twelve basic attribute talents to the god level, if he goes down step by step, he can definitely impact the supreme level with his cultivation talent.

But under the suppression of the universe, even if his cultivation talent reached the supreme level, it was estimated that it would be difficult for him to become a powerhouse above the supreme level.

But if he takes that path against the sky, he has great confidence that he can become the Supreme, or even the existence above the Supreme, beyond the universe.

Once he transcends the universe, even if the universe falls into a major ruin in the future, he will not die, and he can even save his family.

And the Supreme is powerless in the face of the great destruction of the universe, reborn in a lifetime, and has obtained the anti-heaven talent of copying talent, the one of the Protoss dares to take this path, why can't he go?

Feeling Ye Tian's resolute intent, Kunwu Supreme nodded: "Okay, since you have chosen, I will help you hit the Supreme level!"

stats.label: Stats — Cap. 541
stats.fuerza: 20.000+ poderes de dragón (16.° límite físico roto)
stats.copiedTalents: Cultivo Páramo + Aurora Divino + Sable Estrella Matutina + Sombra Supremo + Curación Supremo + Fuerza Arcano + Defensa Arcano + Formación Supremo + Dominio Fuego Arcano + Camuflaje Pseudo-Arcano + Espacial Pseudo-Arcano (40%) + Ojo Sangre Medio + Barrera Agua Arcano + Espinas Tierra Arcano + Enredadera Arcano + Tormenta Arcano + Lunar Arcano + Hipnosis Supremo + Muerte Suspendida Supremo + Sustitución Muerte Supremo + Transferencia Alma Supremo + Tiempo Alto + Inmortal Supremo + Lanza Trueno Arcano + Hielo Arcano + Necromántico Supremo
